title: valerianella locusta
intro: Valerianella locusta, also known as corn salad or lamb's lettuce, is a small, annual plant that belongs to the valerian family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The health benefits of Valerianella locusta include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve overall cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Valerianella locusta is often combined with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and salads, and is also used as a cooking green.
